preferences: TOP PRIORITY: roles located in New York City or Long Island (onsite or hybrid)

REQUIRED: role must be a technical/engineering position where writing or reviewing code is the primary function — software engineering, cybersecurity, AI/ML, data engineering, or similar. Non-technical roles do not qualify regardless of company or location.

REQUIRED: candidate is a May 2027 college graduate seeking new grad full-time roles starting Summer/Fall 2027, or Summer 2027 internships. Roles requiring prior full-time experience or a 2026 or earlier start date are not suitable.
REQUIRED: Full-time new grad or Summer 2027 internship
Also acceptable: fully remote roles anywhere in the US
Also acceptable: SRE, DevOps, platform engineering, and infrastructure engineering roles
Also acceptable: fintech or financial technology roles
Also acceptable: onsite/hybrid roles in Florida, Virginia, Boston, Colorado, Switzerland (Zurich/Basel/Laussane/Lucerne), or Spain
Cybersecurity or AI/ML focus is a strong positive signal
Junior, entry-level, or new grad roles only
dealbreakers: Onsite or hybrid role located outside ALL of these areas: New York metro, Florida, Virginia, Boston, Colorado, Switzerland, Spain
Requires 2+ years of full-time professional experience

Role is non-technical — title contains any of: Account Executive, Account Manager, Sales, Business Development, Counsel, Attorney, Legal, Recruiter, HR, Designer, Architect (non-software), Marketing, Finance Analyst, Operations, Customer Success, Customer Experience — score must be 1 regardless of company or location
Internship with a 2026 or earlier start date — already past, not suitable
Quantitative trading, quantitative research, or quantitative finance roles — not suitable regardless of company or location
